[Home](https://www.banners.com/home) 2. [Canopy Tents](https://www.banners.com/custom-canopy-tents) 3. Canopy Tent Fabric Covers # Canopy Tent Fabric Covers ![Custom canopy tent cover only | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/web.png) Beat the heat and promote your brand with an easily-to-assemble and custom tent! These canopy tents are perfect for keeping out of the rain or harmful sun rays and have waterproof and UV-resistant canopy fabric. Trust our 10’ x 10’ fabric tents to be your reliable buddy, providing a stylish and reliable shelter solution for any occasion. * [Create your Product](#cust) * [Product Dimensions](#5089c547-8c0d-4b30-a624-6df5e4023acf) * [Materials](#8701bedc-bf53-4311-addb-d169bdd1e7b7) * [Warranty](#5594e2aa-abc0-47cf-9f66-d4db941af76d) * [Templates](#c9a3256c-2dc9-495e-b68d-e3fe9374da7e) * [Production](#047d241f-5ca8-4f01-a007-9990a253b1bf) Step 1 - Choose Size and Quantity ## Choose Size Choose the size you want for your product Size (H x W): 84" x 119" 84" x 119" Qty: Step 2 - Choose Add-Ons ## Choose Options Choose the options you want for your product ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options... Step 3 - Choose Design Method Template Design Template Design Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) ![Upload a File](https://lag.azureedge.net/banners-site-layout/ico-04.png) Upload a File Upload a File Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) Professional Designer Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) ### Product Dimensions Product Size: 118.75" W x 84" H x 118.75" D Product Weight: 8.5 lbs Packing Size:17x17x6''/13lbs [Create Your Product](#cust) ### Materials Canopy: 600 Denier Polyester This canopy is constructed of durable, weather-resistant 600 denier polyester. We use a full-color dye sublimation\* process on the white canopy so that the colors chosen for the custom artwork submitted are crisp, vivid, and clear. \*Dye sublimation is the process of fully sturating the fabric versus simply printing on top of it. This allows the color to appear more vivid than other printing varieties. [Create Your Product](#cust) ### One Year Canopy Warranty _1 Year Canopy Warranty_ \- Standard warranty is a parts and labor warranty which warrants product against defects in material and workmanship. It does not cover damage due to accidents, abuse, or normal wear and tear. Products found to be defective will be replaced or repaired at factory's discretion. [Create Your Product](#cust) ### 10' x 10' Canopy Tent Templates 10' x 10' Canopy Tent Templates [**EPS**](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-06-BANS-4x8 Lind Frame template.eps) [![](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/10x10ft Canopy Template.eps)10 x 10 Canopy Tent EPS Template](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/10x10ft Canopy Template.eps) [**PDF**](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-06-BANS-4x8 Lind Frame template.pdf) [![](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/10x10ft canopy template (1).pdf)10 x 10 Canopy Tent PDF Template](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/10x10ft canopy template \(1\).pdf) [Create Your Product](#cust) ### Production Process You will receive a proof of your design _within 24 hours of your order_. Once you approve of your design, our team will put your canopy into production. We will produce and ship your tent within 24 hours of your proof being approved. Please allow 5-7 days for shipping. Due to the size and nature of this product, it will be shipped via UPS Ground Shipping. Your ETA for delivery is 5-7 days
